'''Janzor''' served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="Pax Empirica" /> as an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He was in command of a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of two hundred [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] sent by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], just prior to its [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation]]. Unlike those under his command, Janzor was aware that their platoon was only a distraction while [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Central Command]] landed a much larger army elsewhere.<ref name="Pax Empirica" />

While briefing his [[Gender/Legends|men]] before the mission, Janzor
underestimated the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], whom he described as primitive and possibly descended from [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]]. This was a fatal error and led to his [[Death/Legends|death]], along with those of all but two of his [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]].<ref name="Pax Empirica" />
